organization.organization_background: Utkrusht is a proof-of-skills marketplace that helps agile teams find talent with strong fundamental concepts with within days. We help aspiring professionals improve their profile with continuous improvement in their skills, documenting their journey and helping them fulfill their potential. We primarily build, conduct, proctor and disseminate proof-of-skill assessments in Technical domains like AI, ML, Fullstack development, High scale distributed systems, DevOps etc but do help non-tech roles like Sales, HR, Marketing etc

role_context: A BASIC-level Java Spring Webservices software engineer will independently implement and consume RESTful web services within a Spring Boot application, following controller-service-repository layering and delivering deployable artefacts (JAR or WAR). They design and expose REST endpoints using @RestController with @GetMapping, @PostMapping, @PutMapping, @DeleteMapping, bind inputs via @RequestBody, @PathVariable, @RequestParam, and @Valid, and return appropriate JSON/XML responses with proper HTTP status codes. They consume external REST APIs using RestTemplate or WebClient, handling timeouts and error responses gracefully. They have introductory familiarity with SOAP web services including WSDL-based client generation and basic endpoint creation. They configure Spring IoC with @Configuration, manage common bean scopes, implement transactional service methods with basic persistence through Spring Data JPA, and apply global exception handling with @ControllerAdvice. They work with build tools (Maven/Gradle), operate in an IDE (IntelliJ/Eclipse/VS Code), write unit tests (JUnit 5) with MockMvc and WireMock for service stubbing, generate API documentation with SpringDoc/Swagger, and troubleshoot common issues with logs and Postman/curl, all with limited supervision and in collaboration on story estimation and code reviews.
questions_prompt:
Please ensure the questions you ask cover
- **RESTful API Design & Implementation**: demonstrate the ability to design and implement REST endpoints with @RestController, proper HTTP methods, status codes, request/response binding, content negotiation (JSON/XML), and adherence to REST principles including resource naming and idempotency.
- **API Consumption & Integration**: demonstrate the ability to consume external REST APIs using RestTemplate or WebClient, handle timeouts, parse responses into DTOs, and gracefully handle downstream service errors; show introductory awareness of SOAP/WSDL-based service consumption.
- **Validation, Error Handling & Security**: demonstrate implementing request validation with @Valid and JSR-303/380, global exception handling with @ControllerAdvice and @ExceptionHandler, structured error responses, and basic API security (HTTP Basic, API keys, or simple JWT).
- **Persistence, Transactions & DTO Mapping**: demonstrate integration with persistence via Spring Data JPA or JDBC Template, configure DataSource, apply @Transactional on service methods, perform CRUD, and map entities to DTOs for clean API contracts.
- **Testing, Documentation & Quality**: demonstrate testing REST endpoints with MockMvc and TestRestTemplate, stubbing external services with WireMock, writing unit tests with JUnit 5 and Mockito, generating API documentation with SpringDoc/OpenAPI, and applying basic code quality practices.

The goal is to evaluate whether the candidate can build, consume, test, and document web services in a Spring Boot application following standard patterns and best practices at a BASIC proficiency level.
